moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest Day
moments.blurb: Today, June 21st, marks the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, the longest day and shortest night of the year, occurring at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: General UK
angles.copy: Happy Summer Solstice! Today is the longest day of the year, bringing maximum daylight across the UK. How are you making the most of it?

angles.name: Historical/Mystical Angle
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is here! For thousands of years, people have gathered at sites like Stonehenge to mark this astronomical event. Did you catch the sunrise?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival concludes today, Sunday June 21st, after three days of music at Glasgow Green, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Kasabian, and Richard Ashcroft.

angles.name: Festival Wrap-up
angles.copy: That's a wrap for TRNSMT 2026! What was your highlight from Glasgow Green this weekend? So many incredible acts!

angles.name: Artist Focus (Lewis Capaldi)
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi closing out TRNSMT tonight! What a weekend for Scottish music fans. Who was your favourite act?

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam of the year, begin on Monday, June 29th, running through to July 12th at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Strawberries & Cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off in just over a week on June 29th. Who are you backing for the title this year?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass courts of Wimbledon await! The Championships begin next Monday. Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival begins on Saturday, June 27th, featuring a stellar lineup including Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Teddy Swims, Pete Tong, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off in just six days! Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, and Pete Tong are all set to perform. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Iconic Venue
angles.copy: Music and history collide at Blenheim Palace Festival, starting this Saturday. An incredible setting for some huge artists!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for June 18th - 24th sees Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It I Knew You' at Number 1, with Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' as a new entry at Number 2.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Taylor Swift holds strong at Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart! Is 'I Knew It I Knew You' your favourite right now?

angles.name: New Entry
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo makes a massive new entry at Number 2 with 'Stupid Song' on this week's Official UK Singles Chart! Have you heard it?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey turns 41 today, June 21st.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Lana Del Rey, who turns 41 today! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Music Mood
angles.copy: Celebrate Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday with us today! Perfect excuse for some 'Summertime Sadness' or 'Video Games'.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brandon Flowers
moments.blurb: The Killers' frontman Brandon Flowers celebrates his 45th birthday today, June 21st.

angles.name: Killers Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to The Killers' incredible frontman, Brandon Flowers! What's your favourite song by the band?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Mr. Brightside himself, Brandon Flowers, turns 45 today! Celebrate with some classic Killers on Nation Rocks.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ray Davies
moments.blurb: Legendary Kinks frontman and songwriter Ray Davies turns 82 today, June 21st.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: A very happy 82nd birthday to the iconic Ray Davies of The Kinks! What's your favourite track from the legendary band?

angles.name: Kinks Classic
angles.copy: From 'Waterloo Sunset' to 'Lola', celebrating the incredible songwriting of Ray Davies on his 82nd birthday today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper turns 73 tomorrow, June 22nd. (Born 1953)

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 tomorrow. What's your favourite 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' memory?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Ahead of her 73rd birthday tomorrow, let's hear it for Cyndi Lauper! A true original.

moments.title: Queens That Changed the World S2
moments.blurb: The second season of the docuseries 'Queens That Changed the World' premieres on Thursday, June 25th, on BBC Select.

angles.name: New TV Series
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! 'Queens That Changed the World: Season 2' premieres this Thursday on BBC Select. Who are you hoping they feature?

angles.name: Historical Docuseries
angles.copy: Dive into history with 'Queens That Changed the World: Season 2', starting this Thursday. Perfect for your mid-week viewing!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday, June 26th. (Born 1993)

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate pop royalty! Ariana Grande turns 33 this Thursday. What's your ultimate Ariana track?

angles.name: Birthday Countdown
angles.copy: Only a few days until Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday! Time to get 'Thank U, Next' on repeat.

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open Live
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne International tennis tournament is currently underway, running from June 20th to June 27th at Devonshire Park.

angles.name: Live Tennis
angles.copy: Catch all the action at the Lexus Eastbourne International! The tournament is live all week at Devonshire Park.

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: With Wimbledon just around the corner, the Lexus Eastbourne International is providing some intense warm-up matches! Who are you watching?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman Debbie Harry turns 81 on Friday, July 1st. (Born 1945)

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie turns 81 this Friday. Get ready to celebrate a true music icon!

angles.name: Blondie Forever
angles.copy: Ahead of Debbie Harry's 81st birthday on July 1st, what's your go-to Blondie track? 'Heart of Glass' or 'Call Me'?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Finishes
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival concludes today, Sunday June 21st, after four days of music at Seaclose Park, Newport.

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: Another amazing Isle of Wight Festival has come to a close today! What was your favourite moment from Seaclose Park?

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival wrapped up today, bringing an end to a weekend of fantastic music and island vibes. Who were your highlights?
